_**User**_

## Session — Home UI parity (Stitch + screenshot)

**Constraints:** Follow **`@rules/movielist-project.mdc`**, **`@rules/theming.mdc`**, **`@rules/components.mdc`**, **`@rules/navigation.mdc`**, **`@rules/performance.mdc`**. Colours/spacing only from **`src/theme/`** — do not paste Tailwind hex into RN `StyleSheet`; map HTML roles to **existing tokens**.

**References (source of truth):** **`@resources/home.html`** (layout, hierarchy, spacing rhythm) and **`@resources/home.png`** (pixel check). After changes, compare RN **side-by-side** with the PNG and reconcile every visible mismatch you can justify from the references.

**Goal:** Make **Home** match the references **as closely as RN allows**, including **small details**: header (wordmark + bell), genre chips (active vs inactive), hero (badge, title, synopsis truncation, **Watch Now** / **Details** buttons and gradient), each **content rail** (section title + **See All** styling, card shape, title + metadata line). Fix **inconsistencies** between current RN and references — e.g. **horizontal Home row cards must not show a star/rating badge** in the references; **remove or hide ratings on those cards only** while keeping ratings everywhere else the product still requires (Search results grid, Watchlist cards, See All, Detail, etc.).

**Reuse rule (important):** Prefer **one shared card component** (e.g. `ContentCard`) with an explicit prop such as **`showRating?: boolean`** (default **`true`** for backward compatibility, or default **`false`** if you audit all call sites). **Home horizontal rows** pass **`showRating={false}`** (or equivalent). **Do not** strip rating UI globally unless every consumer is updated intentionally.

**Audit checklist (fix what diverges):**
- Rail cards: **no** rating/star on Home rows per PNG; year • genre line matches reference weight/colour tokens.
- Hero: backdrop height/gradient, NEW RELEASE pill, button pair layout vs HTML.
- Chips: pill shape, active fill token vs inactive surface.
- “LOADING MORE CONTENT” row (if in scope): label typography + spinner vs reference.
- Icons: magnifier/bell/play — match reference presence/size/placement (theme colours, not random hex).
- Any extra UI not in reference (remove) or missing UI (add), without breaking **`useHome`** contracts or navigation.

**Attach:** `@resources/home.html` `@resources/home.png` `@docs/PSD-Home.md` `@src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx` `@src/hooks/useHome.ts` `@src/components/home/` `@src/components/common/` (e.g. `ContentCard`) `@src/theme/` `@src/navigation/`

**Out of scope:** New TMDB features, changing pagination **logic** unless a visual bug forces a tiny tweak, unrelated tabs’ screens (except shared `ContentCard` API).

**Verify:** iOS + Android Home vs PNG; Search/Watchlist/See All still show rating **where** they should; no `axios` in screens; lint/types clean.

**Deliverable:** bullets: **what** changed vs reference + **which** screens pass `showRating` (or equivalent) and how defaults preserve other tabs.

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Adding subtitle formatter**

I'm implementing `formatHomeRailSubtitle` in formatMovieListItem.ts to display year and first genre name, with fallback handling. 

**Updating home content row**

I'm updating HomeContentRow to change color to primary_container for see-all variant. I'm changing HomeContentRow color to primary_container for see-all variant. 

**Simulating gradients**

I'm implementing a simulated gradient using an opaque View overlay with opacity adjustment. 

**Adding svg gradient**

I'm adding an SVG linear gradient overlay using react-native-svg's LinearGradient component. I'm implementing the SVG gradient overlay with a transparent-to-surface transition using react-native-svg's LinearGradient component. 

**Adjusting typography**

I'm adding `label-xs` to the theme/typography for consistent sizing. I'm keeping title-lg per project consistency despite HTML using text-sm. I'm keeping title-lg per components.mdc override despite HTML using text-sm. 

I'm restructuring the poster frame with outer View using radiusCardOuter and inner image using radiusCardInner. I'm adding an outer wrapper with `radiusCardOuter` and `background_surface_container_low` for the poster area. I'm using `radiusCardOuter` (16px) for the outer shell of the poster area to match PSD components. 

**Adding hero gradient**

I'm adding a linear gradient overlay to the hero image using react-native-svg. I'm implementing the hero gradient with SVG linear gradient, matching the HTML gradient pattern from surface to transparent. 

**Adjusting hero synopsis**

I'm adjusting the hero synopsis minHeight and implementing formatHomeRailSubtitle function. 

**Implementing genre mapping**

I'm implementing the genre mapping logic to extract genre names from IDs. I'm handling the case where TMDB genre_ids order may not match the primary genre display by taking the first resolvable genre. I'm adjusting the genre mapping to prioritize the first resolvable genre ID from TMDB. 

**Adjusting UI colors**

I'm setting the header movie icon to colors.primary to match the dark mode HTML background. </details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

Here’s what was implemented and how it lines up with the references.

### What changed vs `home.html` / `home.png` / `PSD-Home.md`

- **Home rails — no star/rating on cards**  
  `ContentCard` now supports `showRating` (default **`true`**). **`HomeContentRow`** passes **`showRating={false}`** so horizontal Home rows match the reference (no badge). **See All**, **Watchlist** (“Because you saved…”), and **Detail** (“More like this”) still omit `showRating`, so they keep the default and still show ratings when TMDB data allows.

- **Rail metadata: `Year · Genre` instead of `Year · rating`**  
  Added **`formatHomeRailSubtitle(item, genres)`** in `src/utils/formatMovieListItem.ts` and wired **`genres`** from **`useHome`** into **`HomeContentRow`** so subtitles match the HTML/PNG line (first resolvable **`genre_ids`** entry against `/genre/movie/list`). **`formatListMovieSubtitle`** (year · rating) is unchanged for grids.

- **`ContentCard` layout**  
  Poster sits in a **`surface_container_low`** shell with **`radiusCardOuter`**, inner mask **`radiusCardInner`** (aligned with card rules + HTML card chrome). Titles use **`numberOfLines={1}`** like the reference `line-clamp-1`.

- **Hero**  
  Backdrop at **0.6** opacity, bottom **`LinearGradient`** scrim (`react-native-svg`, **`colors.surface`** stops only — no stray hex). **“New Release”** uses new typography token **`hero-badge`**. Content insets **`spacing.xxxl`** (~40px) like `bottom-10 left-10`. **Watch Now** / **Details** are **`flex: 1`** so the pair matches the reference width. Synopsis keeps **2 lines**; spacing tuned vs HTML (`mb-8` → **`marginBottom: spacing.xxl`** on synopsis).

- **Chips**  
  Inactive chips use **`surface_container_high`** ( **`PSD-Home` §4** ); strip bottom spacing uses **`spacing.xxxl`** (~`mb-10`). Active stays **`secondary_container`** + **`on_surface`** (HTML).

- **See All link**  
  Label colour is **`primary_container`** (**`PSD-Home` §5**; PNG pink/red link).

- **Header**  
  Film icon uses **`colors.primary`** (dark row in `home.html`); wordmark stays **`brand_coral`** with **`textTransform: 'uppercase'`** (STREAMLIST).

- **“Loading more content”**  
  Footer row **`opacity: 0.4`** to match the reference strip.

- **Skeletons**  
  **`HomeRowSkeleton`** poster uses **`surface_container_low`** + **`radiusCardOuter`**. **`HomeHeroSkeleton`** padding and **flex** CTAs aligned with **`HomeHero`**.

### `showRating` call sites

| Area | `showRating` |
|------|----------------|
| **`HomeContentRow`** | **`false`** (Home horizontal rails only) |
| **`SeeAllScreen`**, **`WatchlistBecauseYouSavedSection`**, **`DetailSimilarSection`** | omitted → **`true`** (badges unchanged) |

### Files touched

- `src/components/common/ContentCard.tsx` — `showRating`, outer poster shell  
- `src/components/home/HomeContentRow.tsx` — `genres`, `formatHomeRailSubtitle`, `showRating={false}`, See All colour  
- `src/components/home/HomeHero.tsx` — scrim, opacity, badge token, CTA layout, padding  
- `src/components/home/HomeHeroSkeleton.tsx` — layout parity  
- `src/components/home/HomeHeader.tsx` — icon + uppercase wordmark  
- `src/components/home/HomeGenreStrip.tsx` — inactive surface + strip spacing  
- `src/components/home/HomeRowSkeleton.tsx` — poster shell tokens  
- `src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx` — `genres` + load-more opacity  
- `src/theme/typography.ts` — **`hero-badge`**  
- `src/utils/formatMovieListItem.ts` — **`formatHomeRailSubtitle`**  
- `__tests__/formatMovieListItem.test.ts` — new tests  

### Verify

- **`npm test`** — all **41** tests pass; **`npx tsc --noEmit`** and ESLint clean on edited paths.  
- **Simulators**: not run here; please compare **Home** to `resources/home.png` on **iOS + Android** (SVG scrim + font loading).

**Note:** Inactive chips follow **`PSD-Home`** (`surface_container_high`). **`home.html`** uses `surface_container_low` for inactive; if you want strict HTML parity, we can switch idle chips back to **`surface_container_low`** in one token change.

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Updating icon paths**

I'm replacing icon paths with fill1 versions for home, search, bookmark, person, notifications, movie, play icons. I'm updating tab bar labels to use sentence case with Inter 10px medium uppercase and letterSpacing 2 for consistency. I'm correcting tab bar labels to Title case per user preference, not uppercase as shown in simulator screenshot. 

**Adjusting tab label styles**

I'm changing the tab label style to font-medium with widest tracking to match the HTML design. I'm adding a new `rail-section-title` token to align the section row title font size with Tailwind's text-2xl. I'm updating the card title styles to use Inter 14 semibold to match the reference design, overriding the default title-lg token. I'm changing the ContentCard title to use `title-sm` with fontWeight '600' to match the html `font-semibold text-sm`. I'm changing ContentCard title from title-lg to title-sm with semibold font for consistency. I'm updating ContentCard title to title-sm with semibold font to match HTML rails, despite breaking the documented title-lg for portrait cards. 

I'm aligning tab label weights to match HTML rails, using fontWeight '700' for active tabs and keeping inactive tabs at their original weight. I'm updating the typography definition for tab labels to use fontWeight '700' for active states, matching the reference design. 

I'm setting tab labels to fontWeight '500' to match the HTML 'font-medium' class. </details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

Here’s what was fixed:

### 1. **“STREAMLIST” → “StreamList”**
- Removed **`textTransform: 'uppercase'`** from the Home header wordmark in `HomeHeader.tsx` so it shows **StreamList** like `SearchAppBar` and the rest of the app.

### 2. **See All colour (`home.html` / `home.png`)**
- In `HomeContentRow.tsx`, **See All** again uses **`colors.on_surface_variant`** and **`title-sm` + semibold**, matching the reference link:  
  `text-on-surface-variant text-sm font-semibold` (not `primary_container`).

### 3. **Filled icons (tabs, header, play)**
- In `SimpleIcons.tsx`, **`PATH_HOME`**, **`PATH_SEARCH`**, **`PATH_BOOKMARK`**, **`PATH_PERSON`**, **`PATH_NOTIFICATIONS`**, **`PATH_MOVIE`**, and **`PATH_PLAY`** were replaced with **Material Symbols Rounded `*_fill1_24px.svg`** paths from `google/material-design-icons` (FILL = 1), so tab bar, header clapperboard + bell, placeholders, and **Watch Now** play icon read as **filled**, aligned with `home.html` (`FILL` 1 on tabs / play).

### 4. **Typography**
- **`headline-rail`** in `typography.ts`: Manrope **24** / **700** / tight tracking — home rail titles like **`text-2xl font-bold`** in `home.html`.
- **`HomeContentRow`** section title uses **`headline-rail`** instead of **`headline-md`** (28px).
- **`ContentCard`** titles use **`title-sm`** + **`fontWeight: '600'`** — same role as card titles in `home.html` (**`text-sm font-semibold`**, Inter).

### 5. **Header clapperboard colour**
- **`IconMovie`** on Home uses **`brand_coral`** again so it matches the coral wordmark and reference screenshots.

### Files touched
`src/components/common/SimpleIcons.tsx`, `src/components/home/HomeHeader.tsx`, `src/components/home/HomeContentRow.tsx`, `src/theme/typography.ts`, `src/components/common/ContentCard.tsx`

`npx tsc --noEmit`, ESLint on those paths, and **`npm test`** all pass.

**Note:** **`ContentCard`** title styling is now **Inter 14 semibold** everywhere (See All grid, Watchlist row, Detail “More like this”), which matches the home rail card reference and keeps one card style across the app.

---

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

Here’s what was updated to align Search with `search.html`, `search-result.html`, and the reference PNGs, while keeping **StreamList** in PascalCase like the rest of the app.

### Header (`SearchAppBar`)
- **`brandWordmark` defaults to `true`**, so **StreamList** uses **`brand_coral`** with the clapperboard, matching `search.html` / `search-result.html` and Home/Watchlist/Profile.
- Watchlist and Profile no longer pass `brandWordmark` (same result, less noise).

### Icons
- **Search field**: `IconSearch` at **24**, **`on_surface_variant`**, inset **`left: spacing.lg`** and a **48px**-wide hit area (same idea as `left-4` + `pl-12`).
- **Recent searches**: **`IconHistory`** uses the **filled** Material glyph (`history_fill1_24px`); size **24**.
- Tab icons were already on filled paths from earlier work.

### Colours (from `src/theme/colors.ts`)
- **`search_input_focus_ring`**: `rgba(255, 83, 81, 0.35)` for the focused search bar (primary-container ring).
- **`poster_rating_scrim`**: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)` for rating pills on posters (`bg-black/40` in `search.html`).

### Typography (`src/theme/typography.ts`)
- **`headline-search`**: Manrope **20** / **700** — “Recent Searches”, “Trending Now”.
- **`title-search-card`**: Manrope **16** / **700** — trending mini cards + results grid titles.
- **`search-input-value`**: Inter **18** / **500** — search `TextInput` (matches results HTML `text-lg font-medium`).

### Search default (`SearchDefaultView.tsx`)
- Search input: **`search-input-value`**, **`paddingVertical: spacing.lg`**, **`paddingLeft: spacing.xxxl + spacing.sm`**, focus border **`search_input_focus_ring`**.
- **Featured** badge: **`primary_container`** + **`hero-badge`** / **`on_primary_container`** (was incorrectly `secondary_container`).
- **Featured title**: **`headline-rail`** + **`fontWeight: '800'`** (closer to `text-2xl font-extrabold`).
- **Section title**: **`headline-search`**.
- **Mini card titles**: **`title-search-card`**; **rating** pill: **`poster_rating_scrim`** + **`hero-badge`** for the number (with `textTransform: 'none'`).
- **Chip labels**: **`fontWeight: '600'`**; **grid row gap**: **`spacing.xl`**.

### Search results (`SearchResultsStateView.tsx`)
- Same search bar / icon layout and focus ring as default.
- **Count line**: **`body-md`**, **500** weight, **`marginTop` / `marginBottom`**, slight **letterSpacing** (results strip).
- **Grid**: vertical **`gap: spacing.xxl`**; row **`gap: spacing.xxl`** (wider gutter like `gap-8`).
- **Card titles**: **`title-search-card`**, **`numberOfLines={1}`**.
- **Rating pills**: **`poster_rating_scrim`** + **`hero-badge`** for values.
- **Empty state** search icon: **44** for clearer hierarchy.

### Recent searches (`SearchRecentSearchesSection.tsx`)
- **Title**: **`headline-search`**.
- **Clear All**: **`primary`** (Tailwind `text-primary` in `search.html`), **`label-sm`**, **600**, uppercase, **`letterSpacing: 2`**.
- **Rows**: **`body-md`** + **`fontWeight: '500'`**; history icon **24**.

### Shared icon asset (`SimpleIcons.tsx`)
- **`PATH_HISTORY`** replaced with the official **fill1** path so recent rows match filled history icons.

### Files touched
`src/theme/colors.ts`, `src/theme/typography.ts`, `src/components/common/SimpleIcons.tsx`, `src/components/search/SearchAppBar.tsx`, `SearchDefaultView.tsx`, `SearchResultsStateView.tsx`, `SearchRecentSearchesSection.tsx`, `src/screens/WatchlistScreen.tsx`, `src/screens/ProfileScreen.tsx`

`npx tsc --noEmit`, ESLint on the touched areas, and **`npm test`** all pass.

To double-check in the simulator: Search default, Search with results, recent list + Clear All, featured strip, grid ratings, and focused search ring vs `resources/search_default.png` / `search_results.png`.
